testcase.name: Home Page loads the homepage successfully

failure.message: Timed out retrying after 4000ms: Expected to find content: 'Welcome to Play Store' but never did.

testcase.failure: AssertionError: Timed out retrying after 4000ms: Expected to find content: 'Welcome to Play Store' but never did. at Context.eval (webpack://playstore-client/./cypress/e2e/home.cy.js:8:41)

testcase.name: Home Page displays the categories and top apps
testcase.classname: displays the categories and top apps

failure.message: Timed out retrying after 4000ms: Expected to find content: 'Top Apps' within the element: <div.py-4.container> but never did.

testcase.failure: AssertionError: Timed out retrying after 4000ms: Expected to find content: 'Top Apps' within the element: <div.py-4.container> but never did. at Context.eval (webpack://playstore-client/./cypress/e2e/home.cy.js:13:46)

testcase.name: Home Page filters apps by category when clicked
testcase.classname: filters apps by category when clicked

failure.message: Timed out retrying after 4000ms: Expected to find element: `.list-group-item`, but never found it.

testcase.failure: AssertionError: Timed out retrying after 4000ms: Expected to find element: `.list-group-item`, but never found it. at Context.eval (webpack://playstore-client/./cypress/e2e/home.cy.js:20:7)

testcase.name: Home Page searches for apps via the navbar search
testcase.classname: searches for apps via the navbar search

failure.message: Timed out retrying after 4000ms: Expected to find element: `input[placeholder="Search apps..."]`, but never found it.

testcase.failure: AssertionError: Timed out retrying after 4000ms: Expected to find element: `input[placeholder="Search apps..."]`, but never found it. at Context.eval (webpack://playstore-client/./cypress/e2e/home.cy.js:28:7)
